---
title: "‘An Interpretation of Hans Christian Andersen’s Story of the “Snow Queen”’"
---

## ‘An Interpretation of Hans Christian Andersen’s Story of the “Snow Queen”’

**Author:** Mary Butler
**Date:** (April 1899)
**Imprint:** <i>Mothers in Council</i> 9 (April 1899) 109-113.

### Notes

See also [[person:239]Mary Caroline Butler].

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
